# BP-4 negative: recovered panic is logged
lang: go
file: BP-4-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "log"

// Guard recovers a panic and logs the recovered value.
func Guard(fn func()) {
	defer func() {
		if value := recover(); value != nil {
			log.Printf("recovered panic: %v", value)
		}
	}()
	fn()
}
